creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to David O'Rourke from comment #1)
Hi David,

According to the Go module naming requirements, Prometheus module name is incorrect - it doesn't have v2 suffix despite Prometheus having 2.x version. Because of that, it's not listed on proxy.golang.org and we have to pull go.mod and dist archive from the Github. These hacks can be removed if/when they fix module naming.
